SEARCH

すべてのクラスおよびインタフェース

クラス
説明
JsonExporter
Converts collected metrics into the syslenz ProcEntry JSON format.
JvmCollector
Collects JVM metrics via java.lang.management MXBeans.
JvmCollector.Metric
A single named metric with a typed value.
MetricRegistry
Registry for custom application metrics.
MetricRegistry.NumberSupplier
 
MetricRegistry.StringSupplier
 
SyslenzAgent
Main entry point for the syslenz Java integration.
SyslenzServer
Lightweight TCP server compatible with the syslenz --connect protocol.
